title: Can This Russian Bakery Survive a 3,500% Tax Increase?
summary_full: The challenges faced by a small-business owner near Moscow highlight how Russia’s war-drained economy is on the doorstep of a major crisis.
summary_public: The challenges faced by a small-business owner near Moscow highlight how Russia’s war-drained economy is on the doorstep of a major crisis.

RU.label: positive
RU.evidence: Russia’s war-drained economy is on the doorstep of a major crisis
